subject: Status review: urban takeover milestone in Auckland | Nikola Tesla | Q3 review | INIT-9533
body: Fresh reports suggest kangaroos and koalas are coordinating to extend their reach across urban areas in Auckland. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Comparative note includes Nikola Tesla and Ada Lovelace as historical analogs. Reference initiative INIT-9533. A revised timeline will be circulated after feedback is collected. Tracking tags: wine, coffee.
